channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: VIDEO: San Francisco cafe employee takes down would-be thief
item.description: The video (above) shows a man wearing a black hoodie and mask walking into the cafe and trying to take an item from a customer dining inside.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, WGN 9

item.title: Trump leans on czars for key policy areas
item.description: President-elect Trump is signaling he plans to lean on appointed czars to carry out his plans in key policy areas, specifically when it comes to immigration and energy production, centralizing power within the White House.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: Storms encase Iowa and eastern Nebraska in ice and generate rare tornado warning in San Francisco
item.description: A major ice storm created treacherous driving conditions across Iowa and eastern Nebraska this weekend and prompted temporary closures of Interstate 80 after numerous cars and trucks slid off the road.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, ABC 4

item.title: Elizabeth Stuart North, beloved wife and mother, dead at 80
item.description: Elizabeth Stuart North, beloved wife of retired Lt. Col. Oliver North, is remembered as "bright, beautiful, bountiful and brave" by her four children in an obituary.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A look back at the most notable bankruptcies of 2024
item.description: This year saw its fair share of bankruptcies, with household names and century-old companies in the mix.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KRON4

item.title: Pelosi 'on the mend' after hip replacement surgery in Germany
item.description: Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), who was hospitalized during a trip to Luxembourg, underwent hip surgery early Saturday, according to a spokesperson.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, KRON4

item.title: OpenAI whistleblower found dead in San Francisco apartment from apparent suicide
item.description: A former OpenAI employee and whistleblower, Suchir Balaji, was found dead in his apartment in San Francisco, California, from an apparent suicide attempt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Detroit area's many Syrians are celebrating Assad's overthrow and planning long-delayed visits
item.description: DEARBORN, Mich. (AP) — Nizam Abazid is gleefully planning his first trip in decades to Syria, where he grew up. Rama Alhoussaini was only 6 years old when her family moved to the U.S., but she's excited about the prospect of introducing her three kids to relatives they've never met in person.
item.dc:creator: COREY WILLIAMS and MIKE HOUSEHOLDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KRON4

item.title: Woman who falsely accused Duke lacrosse players of rape in 2006 publicly admits she lied
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — The woman who in 2006 falsely accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her — making national headlines that stirred tensions about race, class and the privilege of college athletes — has admitted publicly for the first time that she made up the story.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden's commutation in 'kids for cash' scandal angers some Pennsylvania families
item.description: A judge who helped orchestrate one of the worst judicial scandals in U.S.history — a scheme to send children to for-profit jails in exchange for kickbacks — was among the 1,500 people whose sentences were commuted by President Joe Biden this week.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL RUBINKAM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Krispy Kreme offering green doughnuts for 2 days only
item.description: The chain also has a limited time “Merry Grinchmas Doughnut Collection” to celebrate the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Health insurance stocks have fallen since UnitedHealthcare CEO killing
item.description: Major health insurance carriers have seen their stocks tumble amid outrage with the nation's health care industry.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Capitol rioter who tried to join Russian army is sentenced to prison for probation violation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A Dallas man who tried to fly overseas to join the Russian military and fight against Ukraine was sentenced on Friday to six months in prison for violating the terms of his probation for storming the U.S. Capitol four years ago. Kevin Loftus, a 56-year-old veteran of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Real life Elf on a Shelf spreads holiday cheer in Arkansas
item.description: A busy Sherwood intersection had a special visitor, one that many families with young children have in their house during the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Ringo, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court will hear Catholic charitable group's plea to be free from Wisconsin unemployment tax
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Friday said it would take up a new religious rights case over whether a Catholic charitable organization must pay Wisconsin's employment tax.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Prosecutors will seek the death penalty for 2 Venezuelan men accused of killing Texas girl
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Prosecutors in Texas announced Friday that they will seek the death penalty against two Venezuelan men who are accused of killing a 12-year-old Houston girl after they had entered the U.S. illegally.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey governor wants more federal resources for probe into drone sightings
item.description: TOMS RIVER, N.J. (AP) — Gov. Phil Murphy has asked the Biden administration to put more resources into an investigation of mysterious drone sightings that have been reported in New Jersey and nearby states.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A man has pleaded guilty to the death of a 5-year-old girl living in their Kansas homeless camp
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — A man who lived in a makeshift camp with a homeless 5-year-old Kansas girl and her father pleaded guilty Friday to first-degree murder and rape in connection with the child’s death.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Two states sue Glock over add-on allowing machine gun-like firing
item.description: Officials in New Jersey and Minnesota filed a lawsuit against gun manufacturer Glock Thursday, demanding the company suspend its sale of weapons that can be easily converted with a switch to allow over 1,000 rounds of rapid fire.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Woman who accused Duke lacrosse players of rape admits she lied
item.description: A woman who accused three former Duke University men’s lacrosse players of rape nearly two decades ago admitted she lied about the allegations and asked them for forgiveness.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KTLA 5

item.title: Justice Department, Louisville reach deal after probe prompted by Breonna Taylor killing
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — The U.S. Justice Department and the city of Louisville have reached an agreement to reform the city’s police force after an investigation prompted by the fatal police shooting of Breonna Taylor and police treatment of protesters, officials said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: DYLAN LOVAN and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Luxury real estate broker and his twin held without bail on sex trafficking charges
item.description: A prominent luxury real estate broker and his identical twin brother appeared in a Florida courtroom Thursday on sexual assault charges. Another brother, who co-founded the real estate firm, is also charged in what federal officials call a longtime sex trafficking scheme.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Used this parking app? You may qualify for part of $32.8 million settlement
item.description: An estimated 21 million users of the ParkMobile parking app are said to have been impacted by the data breach.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Black denomination upholds stance against same-sex marriage. A gay pastor in its ranks seeks change
item.description: When the African Methodist Episcopal Church, arguably the world’s largest independent Black Protestant denomination, held its quadrennial General Conference in Ohio in August, among the agenda items was an issue that the Rev. Jennifer S. Leath had labored over for two decades: same-sex marriage.
item.dc:creator: DARREN SANDS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump is named Time's Person of the Year, will ring the New York Stock Exchange bell
item.description: About six months ago, Donald Trump was sitting in a courtroom in lower Manhattan listening to a jury make him the first former president convicted of a crime.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE and DAVID BAUDER Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WFLA, NBC
